headline.zh: Senior Product Engineer · Architecture × Product × AI-native Development
headline.en: Senior Product Engineer · Architecture × Product × AI-native Development

tagline.zh: Building Products Where Engineers and AI Collaborate.
tagline.en: Building Products Where Engineers and AI Collaborate.

publicNote.zh: 聯絡方式請透過 LinkedIn 或面試邀請
publicNote.en: Contact via LinkedIn or upon interview invitation

zh: 我打造的是產品，而不只是應用程式。
過去十年，我將商業需求轉化為可上線的系統，橫跨 Healthcare、FinTech、Blockchain、IoT、AI 與 Enterprise Mobile 等領域。
如今，我專注於設計讓工程師與 AI 高效協作的軟體架構——在加速交付的同時，維持工程品質與可維護性。
en: I build products, not just applications.
Over the past decade, I have transformed business requirements into production-ready systems across Healthcare, FinTech, Blockchain, IoT, AI, and Enterprise Mobile.
Today, I focus on designing software architectures where engineers and AI collaborate efficiently to accelerate delivery while maintaining engineering quality.

level.zh: 中階（可閱讀技術文件與溝通）
